Uses of Interface
at.jku.risc.stout.urau.data.Equation

  • Packages that use Equation 
    Package Description
    at.jku.risc.stout.urau.algo
    This package contains the classes of the rule based system AntiUnifySystem, the corresponding problem definition AntiUnifyProblem and some standard implementations of a rigidity function (RigidityFncSubsequence, RigidityFncSubstring ).
    at.jku.risc.stout.urau.data
    This package contains the classes which are needed to build up the term tree.

    • Uses of Equation in at.jku.risc.stout.urau.algo

      Classes in at.jku.risc.stout.urau.algo that implement Equation 
      Modifier and Type Class and Description
      class  AntiUnifyProblem
      This class represents an anti-unification problem (AUP) which consists of one generalization variable (the most general generalization), and two Hedges.

    • Uses of Equation in at.jku.risc.stout.urau.data

      Classes in at.jku.risc.stout.urau.data with type parameters of type Equation 
      Modifier and Type Class and Description
      class  EquationSystem<T extends Equation>
      A system of Equations
      class  InputParser<T extends Equation>
      Tiny term parser with the following rules: [A-Za-z1-9_.] are allowed for variable names and function names.
      Methods in at.jku.risc.stout.urau.data that return Equation 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      Equation Equation.clone()
